let P := primesBelow ⌊x⌋.natAbs
        -- The inequality is actually an equality (Euler product formula)
        refine le_of_eq ?_
        symm
        -- We prove equality by induction on the set of primes P
        have h_euler (s : Finset ℕ) (hs : ∀ p ∈ s, p.Prime) :
            (∏ p ∈ s, ∑' k : ℕ, (p ^ k : ℝ)⁻¹) = ∑' m : {m | ∀ p, p.Prime → p ∣ m → p ∈ s}, (m : ℝ)⁻¹ := by
          induction s using Finset.induction_on with
          | empty =>
            -- Base case: P is empty, S₁ is {1}, sum is 1, product is 1
            simp only [prod_empty, setOf_eq_eq_singleton, zero_div, tsum_singleton, Cast.cast_one, inv_one]
            congr; ext m; simp; constructor
            · intro h; rcases eq_or_ne m 0 with rfl | hm0
              · exfalso; apply Nat.not_prime_zero; apply h 0 (dvd_zero 0)
              · rw [eq_comm, ← Nat.dvd_one, ← Nat.prod_factors_eq_one hm0]
                apply List.prod_eq_one; intro p hp
                exact (h p (Nat.prime_of_mem_factors hp) (Nat.dvd_of_mem_factors hp))
            · rintro rfl p hp; exfalso; exact Nat.not_prime_one hp
          | insert p s hp hi =>
            -- Inductive step: use tsum_mul_tsum and unique factorization
            rw [prod_insert hp, hi (fun q hq ↦ hs q (mem_insert_of_mem hq))]
            -- The proof that the product of sums equals the sum over the new set
            -- relies on the bijection given by unique factorization.
            -- This step requires constructing the equivalence between (ℕ × S_fin s) and S_fin (insert p s).
            sorry
        exact h_euler P (fun p hp ↦ Nat.prime_of_mem_primesBelow hp)

        let P := ⌊x⌋.natAbs.primesBelow
        let S (s : Finset ℕ) := {n : ℕ | ∀ p, p.Prime → p ∣ n → p ∈ s}
        have h (s : Finset ℕ) (hs : ∀ p ∈ s, p.Prime) :
            (∏ p ∈ s, ∑' k : ℕ, (p ^ k : ℝ)⁻¹) = ∑' m : S s, (m : ℝ)⁻¹ := by
          induction s using Finset.induction_on with
          | empty =>
            simp only [prod_empty, forall_mem_empty, not_false_iff, forall_true_left]
            rw [tsum_eq_single 1] <;> simp [Nat.eq_one_of_dvd_one ∘ Nat.dvd_one_of_factors_eq_nil ∘ List.eq_nil_iff_forall_not_mem.mpr]
          | insert p s hp ih =>
            rw [prod_insert hp, ih (fun q hq ↦ hs q (mem_insert_of_mem hq)), ← (ENNReal.tsum_mul_tsum _ _).toReal]
            swap; · apply ENNReal.summable
            swap; · apply ENNReal.summable
            refine tsum_eq_tsum_of_ne_zero_bij (fun ⟨⟨m, hm⟩, k⟩ ↦ ⟨m * p ^ k, by
                intro q hq' hdiv
                rcases (Nat.mem_factors hdiv).mp hq' with ⟨hqp, hqm⟩
                · rw [mem_insert]; left; exact (Nat.prime_dvd_prime_iff_eq hq' (hs p (mem_insert_self p s))).mp hqp
                · rw [mem_insert]; right; exact hm q hq' hqm
              ⟩) ?_ ?_ ?_
            · rintro ⟨⟨m1, hm1⟩, k1⟩ ⟨⟨m2, hm2⟩, k2⟩ heq
              simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq] at heq
              have hp_pr : p.Prime := hs p (mem_insert_self p s)
              have h_coprime : ∀ m, (∀ q, q.Prime → q ∣ m → q ∈ s) → ¬ p ∣ m :=
                fun m hm hdiv ↦ hp (hm p hp_pr hdiv)
              have hk : k1 = k2 := by
                apply (Nat.pow_dvd_pow_iff_dvd_pow_of_prime hp_pr).mp
                rw [heq] at *; exact ⟨dvd_mul_left _ _, (mul_dvd_mul_iff_right (Nat.pow_pos (Nat.Prime.pos hp_pr) _)).mp (dvd_mul_left _ _)⟩
              rcases hk with rfl
              simp only [mul_eq_mul_right_iff, Nat.pow_pos (Nat.Prime.pos hp_pr) k1, or_false] at heq
              exact Prod.ext (Subtype.ext heq) rfl
            · rintro ⟨n, hn⟩ hnz
              refine ⟨⟨⟨n / p ^ n.factorization p, ?_⟩, n.factorization p⟩, ?_⟩
              · intro q hq' hdiv
                have := hn q hq' (dvd_trans hdiv (Nat.div_dvd_of_dvd (Nat.ord_proj_dvd n p)))
                rw [mem_insert] at this; cases this with
                | inl h => exfalso; rw [h] at hdiv; exact Nat.not_dvd_ord_compl (hs p (mem_insert_self p s)) 0 hdiv
                | inr h => exact h
              · simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq]; exact Nat.ord_compl_mul_ord_proj n p
            · rintro ⟨⟨m, hm⟩, k⟩
              simp only [cast_mul, cast_pow, mul_inv, ENNReal.coe_mul, ENNReal.coe_pow]
        convert h P (fun p ↦ prime_of_mem_primesBelow) using 1
        ext m; simp [S₁, S, primesBelow, Nat.Prime]; aesop

rw [← prod_primesBelow_tsum_geometric_of_prime_eq_tsum_smooth_of_primesBelow]
        apply tsum_le_tsum
        · intro b hb
          simp only [S₁, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hb
          simp only [smooth_of_primesBelow, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
          intro p hp hpb
          exact lt_succ_of_le (hb p hp hpb)
        · apply (summable_smooth_of_primesBelow (⌊x⌋.natAbs + 1)).summable

let P := primesBelow ⌊x⌋.natAbs
        have hP : ∀ p ∈ P, p.Prime := fun p hp ↦ prime_of_mem_primesBelow hp
        rw [Finset.prod_tsum]
        · refine le_of_eq ?_
          let g : (P → ℕ) → S₁ x := fun f ↦ ⟨∏ p ∈ P, p ^ f p, fun q hq h ↦ by
             rw [Nat.prime_dvd_prod_iff_mem_factor_prime hq] at h
             rcases h with ⟨p, hp, hdiv⟩
             rwa [(Nat.prime_dvd_prime_iff_eq hq (hP p hp)).mp hdiv]⟩
          have hg : Function.Bijective g := by
            constructor
            · intro f1 f2 h; ext p
              apply Nat.dvd_antisymm
              · apply Nat.prime_pow_dvd_iff_dvd_pow_exp (hP p p.2); rw [← Subtype.mk_eq_mk.mp h]; apply dvd_refl _
              · apply Nat.prime_pow_dvd_iff_dvd_pow_exp (hP p p.2); rw [Subtype.mk_eq_mk.mp h]; apply dvd_refl _
            · intro ⟨m, hm⟩
              use fun p ↦ m.factorization p; apply Subtype.ext
              nth_rw 1 [← Nat.prod_pow_factorization_eq_self m]
              refine Finset.prod_subset m.factorization.support P ?_ ?_
              · intro q hq; exact hm q (Nat.prime_of_mem_factorization hq) (Nat.dvd_of_mem_factorization hq)
              · intro q _ hq; rw [Nat.mem_support_iff, not_not] at hq; simp [hq]
          rw [Equiv.tsum_eq (Equiv.ofBijective g hg)]
          congr; ext f
          simp only [OneDiv.to_oneDiv, Finset.prod_inv_distrib, inv_pow, Nat.cast_prod, Nat.cast_pow]
        · intro p hp
          simp only [OneDiv.to_oneDiv, inv_pow]
          apply summable_geometric_of_lt_1 (inv_nonneg.mpr (Nat.cast_nonneg _))
          rw [inv_lt_one_iff_of_pos (Nat.cast_pos.mpr (Prime.pos (hP p hp)))]
          exact Nat.one_lt_cast.mpr (Prime.one_lt (hP p hp))

rw [← prod_primes_pow_sum_eq_tsum_S1]
        refine le_of_eq (tsum_congr fun m ↦ ?_)
        congr 1
        simp only [S₁, mem_setOf_eq, mem_primesBelow, mem_filter, mem_range, Nat.lt_succ_iff]
        refine ⟨fun h p hp hpm ↦ ⟨hp, le_trans (h p hp hpm) (Nat.le_floor x)⟩,
          fun h p hp hpm ↦ le_of_le_of_eq (h p hp hpm).2 (Nat.floor_eq_iff.mpr ⟨hxge, hxlt⟩).1⟩
exact le_of_eq sorry

rw [Finset.prod_tsum]
        · refine tsum_le_tsum_of_inj (fun f ↦ ∏ p in ⌊x⌋.natAbs.primesBelow, p ^ f p) ?_ ?_ ?_ ?_
          · exact fun f g h ↦ FunLike.ext f g fun p ↦ Nat.pow_right_injective (Prime.two_le (mem_filter.1 p.2).2) (by
              rw [← Nat.mem_prime_factors] at p; simp at p;
              have := Nat.prime_factors_injective_of_coprime (fun _ _ _ _ h ↦ (Coprime.pow_left _ (Coprime.pow_right _ (Nat.coprime_of_ne_prime (mem_filter.1 ‹_›.2).2 (mem_filter.1 ‹_›.2).2 h)))) h;
              exact (this.1 p).mp (by simp))
          · intro f; rw [S₁, Set.mem_setOf_eq]; intro p hp h; rw [Nat.primesBelow, mem_filter, mem_range] at *
            exact le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.prime_dvd_prod_iff.1 h).1 (Nat.le_floor hxge))
          · intro m hm; use fun p ↦ if p ∈ ⌊x⌋.natAbs.primesBelow then m.factors.count p else 0
            rw [← Nat.prod_factors_to_finset m, ← Finset.prod_filter_of_ne (fun _ _ h ↦ h rfl)]
            apply Finset.prod_congr; · ext; simp [Nat.primesBelow, mem_filter, mem_range, hm _ (by simp) (Nat.dvd_of_mem_factors (by simp [iff_def]))]; linarith [Nat.le_floor hxge]
            · intro; simp
          · apply Summable.subtype; simp
        · intro p hp; apply summable_geometric_of_lt_1; simp; apply inv_lt_one; exact one_lt_cast.mpr (Prime.one_lt (mem_filter.mp hp).2)

rw [le_iff_eq]
        refine (prod_sum_prime_pow (fun p hp ↦ (mem_primesBelow.1 hp).2)).symm.trans ?_
        congr 1
        ext m
        simp only [S₁, mem_smoothNumbers, mem_primesBelow, Set.mem_setOf_eq, and_imp]
        refine ⟨fun h p hp hpm ↦ lt_succ_of_le <| (Nat.le_floor_iff (by linarith [hxge])).1 (h p hp hpm),
                fun h p hp hpm ↦ (Nat.le_floor_iff (by linarith [hxge])).2 <| le_of_lt_succ <| h p hp hpm⟩

rw [← tsum_finset_prod (fun p hp ↦ summable_geometric_of_lt_1 (inv_nonneg.mpr (Nat.cast_nonneg p))
          (inv_lt_one_of_one_lt_of_pos (Nat.one_lt_cast.mpr (Prime.one_lt (prime_of_mem_primesBelow hp)))
          (Nat.cast_pos.mpr (Prime.pos (prime_of_mem_primesBelow hp)))))]
        refine le_of_eq (tsum_eq_tsum_of_ne_zero_bij (fun f _ ↦ ∏ p ∈ primesBelow ⌊x⌋.natAbs, p ^ f p)
          (fun _ _ ↦ by
             rw [S₁, Set.mem_setOf_eq]; intro q hq hdiv
             rw [Finset.prod_prime_pow_dvd_iff (fun p _ ↦ prime_of_mem_primesBelow p)] at hdiv
             exact hdiv.1)
          (fun _ _ ↦ by simp only [cast_prod, cast_pow, prod_inv_distrib, inv_pow])
          (fun f g _ _ h ↦ by
             dsimp at h
             refine Function.funext_iff.mpr fun p ↦ ?_
             apply (Nat.Prime.pow_dvd_iff_le_factorization (prime_of_mem_primesBelow p.prop)).mp
             rw [← Nat.factorization_prod_pow_eq_self (∏ p ∈ primesBelow ⌊x⌋.natAbs, p ^ f p), h,
                 Nat.factorization_prod_pow_eq_self]
             · simp [prime_of_mem_primesBelow]
             · simp [prime_of_mem_primesBelow])
          (fun m hm hnz ↦ ⟨fun p ↦ m.factorization p, fun _ ↦ trivial, by
             simp only [cast_prod, cast_pow, prod_inv_distrib, inv_pow]
             rw [← Nat.factorization_prod_pow_eq_self m]
             · apply Finset.prod_congr rfl; intro p hp; rw [cast_pow, inv_pow]
             · intro p hp; apply hm p hp; rw [Nat.mem_factors_iff_dvd hp (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by exact_mod_cast hnz))]
               exact dvd_refl p⟩))

rw [← tsum_finset_pi]
        on_goal 2 => intro p hp; exact summable_geometric_of_lt_1 (by positivity) (inv_lt_one (one_lt_cast.mpr (Prime.one_lt (mem_primesBelow.mp hp).2)))
        refine tsum_le_tsum_of_inj (fun m p ↦ m.1.factors.count p) ?_ (fun _ ↦ trivial) ?_
        · intro a b h
          ext1
          apply Nat.eq_of_factors_eq_count
          · intro p
            if hp : p ∈ primesBelow ⌊x⌋.natAbs then exact congr_fun h ⟨p, hp⟩ else
            rw [not_mem_primesBelow] at hp
            simp [Nat.factors_count_eq_zero_of_not_dvd (mt (fun d ↦ a.2 _ (Nat.prime_of_mem_factors d) (Nat.dvd_of_mem_factors d)) hp),
                  Nat.factors_count_eq_zero_of_not_dvd (mt (fun d ↦ b.2 _ (Nat.prime_of_mem_factors d) (Nat.dvd_of_mem_factors d)) hp)]
          all_goals
            intro h0
            obtain ⟨p, hp⟩ := Nat.exists_infinite_primes (⌊x⌋.natAbs + 1)
            apply (not_le_of_gt hp).2
            apply (by assumption : S₁ x).2 p hp.prime (h0 ▸ dvd_zero p)
        · intro m
          simp only [coe_mk]
          rw [← inv_prod, inv_inj]
          norm_cast
          convert (Nat.prod_factors_pow m.1 _).symm
          · refine Finset.prod_subset (fun p hp ↦ mem_primesBelow.mpr ⟨Nat.prime_of_mem_factors hp, m.2 _ (Nat.prime_of_mem_factors hp) (Nat.dvd_of_mem_factors hp)⟩) ?_
            intro p _ hp
            apply Nat.factors_count_eq_zero_of_not_dvd
            intro h
            apply hp
            rw [Nat.mem_factors_iff_dvd m.1.pos_of_ne_zero (Nat.prime_of_mem_primesBelow p.2)] at h
            exact h
          · intro h0
            obtain ⟨p, hp⟩ := Nat.exists_infinite_primes (⌊x⌋.natAbs + 1)
            apply (not_le_of_gt hp).2
            apply m.2 p hp.prime (h0 ▸ dvd_zero p)
+ 1), (∑' k : ℕ, (p ^ k : ℝ)⁻¹)) := by sorry

refine le_of_eq ?_
        rw [← Nat.prod_sum_prime_pow_eq_tsum, tsum_subtype_eq_tsum_indicator]
        apply tsum_congr
        intro m
        by_cases h : m ∈ S₁ x
        · rw [Set.indicator_of_mem h, Set.indicator_of_mem]
          simp only [S₁, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h
          intro p hp hpm
          rw [Nat.mem_primesBelow]
          exact ⟨hp, lt_of_le_of_lt (h p hp hpm) hxlt⟩
        · rw [Set.indicator_of_not_mem h, Set.indicator_of_not_mem]
          intro h'
          apply h
          intro p hp hpm
          exact le_of_lt (h' p hp hpm).2
  sorry

rw [← prod_tsum]
        congr 1
        ext m
        simp only [S₁, primesBelow, mem_filter, mem_range, mem_setOf_eq]
        refine ⟨fun h p hp hpm ↦ lt_of_le_of_lt (h p hp hpm) (Nat.lt_floor_add_one x),
                fun h p hp hpm ↦ Nat.le_floor.2 (le_of_lt (h p hp hpm))⟩
